sections.title: Standard dialogue after Monkey Madness II

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Good day, [player name]. What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a new monkey talisman...

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Not a problem, Awowogei has given us access to all the resources we need to create new talismans.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: What type of talisman are you after then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a small ninja talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a medium ninja talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a large ninja talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a small zombie talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a large zombie talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a gorilla talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a bearded gorilla talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a karamjan monkey talisman, please.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a monkeyspeak amulet...

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a 10th squad sigil...

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: You already have one of those, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just passing by.

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Okay. Farewell, [player name].
